'''lalana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabouri|kabouri]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabouri|kabouri]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lalana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lælænæth|lælænæth]] || [[word:lælænæj|lælænæj]] || [[word:lælænæsh|lælænæsh]] || [[word:lælænæ|lælænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lalalanath|lalalanath]] || [[word:lalalanaj|lalalanaj]] || [[word:lalalanash|lalalanash]] || [[word:lalalana|lalalana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lalanath|lalanath]] || [[word:lalanaj|lalanaj]] || [[word:lalanash|lalanash]] || [[word:lalana|lalana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lalafnath|lalafnath]] || [[word:lalafnaj|lalafnaj]] || [[word:lalafnash|lalafnash]] || [[word:lalafnaf|lalafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lalanatha|lalanatha]] || [[word:lalanaja|lalanaja]] || [[word:lalanasha|lalanasha]] || [[word:lalanaka|lalanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lalanath|lalanath]] || [[word:lalanaj|lalanaj]] || [[word:lalanash|lalanash]] || [[word:lalana|lalana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lalanathal|lalanathal]] || [[word:lalanajal|lalanajal]] || [[word:lalanashal|lalanashal]] || [[word:lalanakal|lalanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lalanathatha|lalanathatha]] || [[word:lalanajaja|lalanajaja]] || [[word:lalanashasha|lalanashasha]] || [[word:lalanaka|lalanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lalanathan|lalanathan]] || [[word:lalanajan|lalanajan]] || [[word:lalanashan|lalanashan]] || [[word:lalanakan|lalanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lalanathaoro|lalanathaoro]] || [[word:lalanajaoro|lalanajaoro]] || [[word:lalanashaoro|lalanashaoro]] || [[word:lalanakaoro|lalanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
